ApmFilter.title: ApmFilter
ApmFilter.description: Key-value filter for APM metrics. Supports single value (legacy) or multiple values (OR semantics)

value.description: Deprecated: use values instead. Single value to match (kept for backward compatibility)

values.description: Preferred: multiple values to match (OR semantics, e.g. status IN [500, 503])

items.description: Preferred: multiple values to match (OR semantics, e.g. status IN [500, 503])

percentile.description: Percentile for latency SLOs (0.95 = P95, 0.99 = P99)

threshold.description: Threshold in milliseconds. Good when latency <= threshold, bad when latency > threshold.
Threshold in milliseconds. Good when latency <= threshold, bad when latency > threshold.

labelName.description: Filter by a specific SLO label key.

productType.description: Filter discriminator for SLO product type values.

serviceName.description: Filter by service name from the APM SLI services list (not ownership tags). Only valid for APM product SLOs. MUST be used together with a product_type filter that includes APM; the server may reject the request otherwise. To filter by configured ownership service on any SLO type, use ownership_service_values instead.

sloType.description: Filter discriminator for SLO type values.

SloOwnershipTag.title: SloOwnershipTag
SloOwnershipTag.description: Ownership for one dimension (service, environment, or team). static_values are group-wide (broad) assignments. label_keys are metric label names whose values are read per permutation (label-driven). Both may be set; when both lists are empty, that dimension is unset.

labelKeys.description: Metric label names to use as sources (label-driven). Actual values come from series at query time. Empty if not using label-driven for this dimension.

items.description: Metric label names to use as sources (label-driven). Actual values come from series at query time. Empty if not using label-driven for this dimension.

resolvedValues.description: Flat, deduplicated union of static_values and the values resolved from label_keys across observed permutations (empties excluded). Empty when neither source yields any value. Provides a single searchable list of values for this ownership tag, regardless of source.

items.description: Flat, deduplicated union of static_values and the values resolved from label_keys across observed permutations (empties excluded). Empty when neither source yields any value. Provides a single searchable list of values for this ownership tag, regardless of source.

staticValues.description: Group-wide static values (broad). Empty if not using broad for this dimension.

items.description: Group-wide static values (broad). Empty if not using broad for this dimension.

SloOwnershipTags.title: SloOwnershipTags
SloOwnershipTags.description: Service, environment, and team ownership for the SLO group. At most one SloOwnershipTag per dimension; omit a dimension when unset.
